name: Amuro Tooru
description:
[[DETECTIVE CONAN SPOILERS]] [[WIP]]

His real name is Furuya Rei. He's a PSB (Public Security Bureau) agent who is currently in an undercover mission to spy on a dark organization under the name Amuro Tooru and earned the codename Bourbon. To hide his real occupation as a PSB agent, he works in a cafe named Poirot.
creator: chizuoru
